## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Renato Valdes Olmos' potential role as Head of Design at growthx.ai with Marcel Santilli.](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Renato has extensive experience scaling design teams (30+ at Honor, 80 at Lyft, 80 at Grammarly) and leading product/brand design, research, and product management.](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [growthx.ai operates a unique dual-business model: client-facing services and an internal AI-powered workflow engine, with \~45 customers and $160k avg. deal size.](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [The company is exploring various product directions (editor tools, knowledge worker apps, micro-apps) to codify and enhance knowledge work productivity.](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [growthx.ai's business model is highly efficient (48% win rate, 29-day sales cycle) with strong financials (70%+ gross margins, profitable in Q1).](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Topics

### Renato's Career Journey

  - [Started as a graphic designer, transitioned to UI/UX](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Founded multiple startups (CardCloud, Human) with exits](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Joined Honor as 5th leadership member, scaled design team to 30](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Led 80-person design org at Lyft, redesigned core app](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Grew Grammarly's design team from 5 to 80 in 2 years](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Recent roles: EIR at VC fund, brief stint at Pitch (laid off)](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### growthx.ai's Unique Business Model

  - [Dual focus: Client-facing services + internal AI-powered workflow engine](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Product users are service deliverers, not end clients](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - ["Product market fit engine": Paid to deliver outcomes, then optimize delivery](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Codifying knowledge work into reusable, learnable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [High efficiency: $160k avg. deal size, 48% win rate, 29-day sales cycle](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [45 customers, booked through April, zero marketing spend](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### Product Vision and Challenges

  - [Exploring various form factors: editor tools, Cursor-like experience, micro-apps](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Balancing AI capabilities, engineering feasibility, and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Potential to expand services (e.g., case studies, recruiting, sales processes)](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Opportunity to define the business model for AI-native companies](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Growth Strategy and Customer Evolution

  - [Guide customers through growth stages: content creation → traffic → distribution → sales opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Expand services across marketing, sales, customer success, and hiring](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Potential for API access to workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Developing a Cursor-like experience for knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore how Renato's experience aligns with growthx.ai's product vision and challenges](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Discuss potential role in shaping the user experience and product strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Consider how Renato's team-scaling expertise can support growthx.ai's growth plans](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [Follow up on any unfinished topics due to Marcel's need to commute](https://fathom.video/share/yz2yPRGxrwxL1pWkxxUyNfyurMzGF9fi?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
